transcription.text: Folks, I've seen a thing or two, but these prescription prices, pricey, higher than a rooster on stilts. Ain't that right, Dusty Pete? Reckon it's time we rope them in. Good Rx makes saving time and money easier than splitting a biscuit. Paper's looking mighty big for its britches there, partner. Yee-haw! Save time and money on prescriptions. Check Good Rx.
